channel.title: Comments on: Episode 10 – Kona’s Fire Rock Pale Ale
channel.description: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

item.title: By: Paul
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description: We are currently switching players from Brightcove to Viddler as we are preparing to relaunch the site with a new design - that might be the problem. It runs fine on my computer.
item.content:encoded: We are currently switching players from Brightcove to Viddler as we are preparing to relaunch the site with a new design – that might be the problem. It runs fine on my computer.

item.title: By: John
item.dc:creator: John
item.description: I can't seem to get this video to run. I went to viddler and other videos from thier site run ok. Any ideas?
item.content:encoded: I can’t seem to get this video to run. I went to viddler and other videos from thier site run ok. Any ideas?
